epigraph.text: The average man does not want to be free. He simply wants to be safe.

follyOfTheDay.headline: Politician's dinosaur workplace proposal narrowly rejected
follyOfTheDay.summary: In a moment that crystallizes the peculiar degradation of modern civic deliberation, alderman Robert Peterson of an unnamed municipality stood before city council and proposed designating the first Friday of July as 'Bring Your Dinosaur to Work Day.' What should have been immediately laughed out of chambers instead received serious consideration—a 6-5 vote to reject the measure was narrow enough that it nearly achieved institutional legitimacy. Peterson's office released a statement expressing profound disappointment at the council's 'lack of forward-thinking' and 'catastrophic failure for civic engagement.' The proposal included a three-page explanation of 'taxonomy-neutral workplace inclusivity,' suggesting that the good alderman had invested non-trivial intellectual labor into making dinosaurs a mandatory part of employment infrastructure.
follyOfTheDay.commentary: That it came *this close* is somehow worse than if it had been unanimously dismissed. Democracy is merely the tyranny of the mediocre, formally organized.

stories.headline: Man attempts to teach behavioral correction to 9-foot alligator
Woman files $87,000 lawsuit against neighbor for excessive Rogers & Hammerstein whistling
HOA FINES RESIDENT $50,000 FOR WRONG SHADE OF BEIGE
Florida man attempts to purchase groceries using laminated crayon drawing of currency
Kentucky inventor patents 'the wheel, but slightly oval'
PERSON ARGUES WITH METEOROLOGIST THAT RAIN IS FAKE CGI
Man loses staring contest with goose; loses possessions as well

campusWatch.headline: Ivy League school adds emotional support peacock to mental health program
campusWatch.summary: An unnamed prestigious university announced Gerald, a 6-year-old peacock, as the newest member of its mental health initiative. Students may pet Gerald during exam season, though he has bitten three students and destroyed $4,000 in textbooks.

campusWatch.headline: UC Berkeley eliminates pronouns to reduce cognitive load
campusWatch.summary: A new campus-wide protocol requires all written communication to eliminate pronouns entirely, replaced by students' complete legal names. A 4,000-word essay assignment expanded to 8,000 words as a result.

treadwellCorner.headline: Florida man's attempt to educate alligator ends predictably
treadwellCorner.summary: A 34-year-old Brevard County man discovered that a 9-foot alligator near a golf course 7th hole would not be receptive to behavioral correction, even when armed with a pool noodle. He was detained by authorities.

treadwellCorner.headline: Goose victorious in unexpected dominance contest
treadwellCorner.summary: A public park visitor challenged a goose to a staring contest, believing himself superior in willpower. The encounter lasted 23 seconds and cost him three possessions and his dignity.
